title: senecio bolivarianus
intro: Senecio bolivarianus, also known as Bolivian Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the high-altitude regions of Bolivia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Senecio bolivarianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
